issue_defect_or_repair.pipeline:
Pipeline(steps=[('normalizer', Normalizer(norm=np.str_('max'))),
                ('selectpercentile',

                ('featureunion-1',
                 FeatureUnion(transformer_list=[('skiptransformer',
                                                 SkipTransformer()),
                                                ('passthrough',
                                                 Passthrough())])),

                 FeatureUnion(transformer_list=[('skiptransformer',
                                                 SkipTransformer()),

                               learning_rate=np.str_('constant'),
                               learning_rate_init=0.0558851230308,
                               n_iter_no_change=32, random_state=42))])

issue_public_procurement.pipeline:
Pipeline(steps=[('robustscaler',
                 RobustScaler(quantile_range=(0.139906572611,
                                              0.7147270294414))),
                ('selectpercentile',
                 SelectPercentile(percentile=66.6743700054632)),
                ('featureunion-1',
                 FeatureUnion(transformer_list=[('skiptransformer',
                                                 SkipTransformer()),
                                                ('passthrough',
                                                 Passthrough())])),
                ('featureunion-2',
                 FeatureUnion(transformer_list=[('skiptransformer',
                                                 SkipTransformer()),
                                                ('passthrough',
                                                 Passthrough())])),
                ('randomforestclassifier',
                 RandomForestClassifier(bootstrap=np.True_,
                                        criterion=np.str_('gini'),
                                        max_features=0.0577679950302,
                                        min_samples_leaf=20,
                                        min_samples_split=6, n_estimators=128,
                                        n_jobs=1, random_state=42))])

issue_promissory_note.pipeline:
Pipeline(steps=[('passthrough', Passthrough()),
                ('selectpercentile',
                 SelectPercentile(percentile=64.0949890237099)),
                ('featureunion-1',
                 FeatureUnion(transformer_list=[('featureunion',
                                                 FeatureUnion(transformer_list=[('powertransformer',
                                                                                 PowerTransformer())])),
                                                ('passthrough',

                ('featureunion-2',
                 FeatureUnion(transformer_list=[('skiptransformer',

                                                ('passthrough',

                ('decisiontreeclassifier',

                                        random_state=42))])
